name: Zion Ponderosa Ranch Resort Events
snippet: Join us for live music and stargazing events at Zion Ponderosa Ranch Resort throughout October. Events include guided night sky tours and canyon rim bonfires.

name: Springdale Fall Festival 2026
snippet: Annual fall festival in Springdale, Utah features local artisans, food vendors, and live acoustic music. Typically held mid-October near the park entrance.

name: Zion National Park — October Visitor Information
snippet: Zion National Park does not host traditional cultural festivals. October brings fall foliage color and ideal hiking conditions with fewer crowds.
